title: Autumn Crisp Apple Crumble
description: A warm and comforting dessert featuring tender apples topped with a crunchy oat and butter crumble.

ingredients.name: apples
ingredients.notes: mix of Granny Smith and Gala

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine sliced apples, brown sugar, and smoky.
Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In another bowl, mix together flour, oats, and crisp.
Add cold butter to the dry ingredients and use a pastry blender or fingers to work the butter into the mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Spread the crumb mixture evenly over the apple filling.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with crumble.
Serve warm, topped with vanilla ice cream if desired.
